handoff: Review the shortlist before contacting suppliers or moving any vendor into procurement.

suppliers.description: ISO certified electronics manufacturer with export shipments and custom assembly capacity.
Low-volume injection molding shop with limited export references.

name: Supplier shortlist triage

steps.name: Analyze supplier records
steps.output: Supplier rows with capability tags, country signals, risk score, opportunity score, and recommended sourcing action.

steps.name: Split by sourcing action
steps.output: High-opportunity suppliers move to sourcing follow-up; high-risk suppliers move to verification.

steps.name: Refresh the shortlist
steps.output: Append the best candidates to a weekly sourcing review queue with reason, risk, and next action.
